name: Infura
description: Infura — ConsenSys managed Web3 API provider offering scalable Ethereum, Polygon, and IPFS node infrastructure.

seo.title: Infura — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Infura: Infura — ConsenSys managed Web3 API provider offering scalable Ethereum, Polygon, and IPFS node infrastructure.

when_to_use: Scalable Ethereum RPC for high-traffic Web3 application
IPFS API for decentralized NFT metadata storage
Multi-network support: Mainnet, Goerli, Sepolia testnet
WebSocket subscriptions for real-time blockchain events
Backup node provider for production dapp resilience

review.verdict: Same product as the Consensys entry; reliable Web3 RPC but creates single point of failure for dApps.
review.best_for: Production dApps on Ethereum, Polygon, or L2 chains

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
